                      static U32 s_safe_rotr(U32 value, U8 bits)
                      {
    41 1 0     (T)    s_safe_rotr
    42 1 1      *       U8 u8t_bits = (U8)(bits % ( U8 )32U);
    43 1 2      *       U32 u32t_result = value;
    44 1 3     (T)(F)   if (u8t_bits != ( U8 )0U)
                          {
    46 1 4      *         u32t_result = (U32)((value >> u8t_bits) | (value << (( U8 )32U - u8t_bits)));
                          }
    48 1 5      *       return u32t_result;
                      }
                      static void s_sha256_transform(SHA256_CTX *ctx, const U8 data[])
                      {
                      	U32 a, b, c, d, e, f, g, h, i, j, t1, t2, m[64];
    54 2 0     (T)    s_sha256_transform
    58 2 1     (T)(F)   for (i = ( U32 )0U; i < ( U32 )16U; i++)
                      	{
    60 2 2      *         j = i * ( U32 )4U;
    61 2 3      *         m[i] = ((U32)data[j] << 24U) | ((U32)data[j + 1U] << 16U) | ((U32)data[j + 2U] << 8U) | ((U32)data[j + 3U]);
                      	}
    64 2 4     (T)(F)   for ( ; i < ( U32 )64U; i++)
                      	{
    66 2 5      *         m[i] = ((U32)((U32)(((U32)((U32)((s_safe_rotr((U32)(m[i - ( U32 )2U]), (17U)) ^ s_safe_rotr((U32)(m[i - ( U32 )2U]), (19U)) ^ ((U32)(m[i - ( U32 )2U]) >> 10U))) + (U32)(m[i - ( U32 )7U])))) + (U32)(((U32)((U32)((s_safe_rotr((U32)(m[i - ( U32 )15U]), (7U)) ^ s_safe_rotr((U32)(m[i - ( U32 )15U]), (18U)) ^ ((U32)(m[i - ( U32 )15U]) >> 3U))) + (U32)(m[i - ( U32 )16U]))))));
                      	}
    69 2 6      *       a = ctx->state[0]; 
    69 2 7      *       b = ctx->state[1]; 
    69 2 8      *       c = ctx->state[2]; 
    69 2 9      *       d = ctx->state[3];
    70 2 10     *       e = ctx->state[4]; 
    70 2 11     *       f = ctx->state[5]; 
    70 2 12     *       g = ctx->state[6]; 
    70 2 13     *       h = ctx->state[7];

    73 2 15     *         t1 = ((U32)((U32)(((U32)((U32)(((U32)((U32)(((U32)((U32)(h) + (U32)((s_safe_rotr((U32)(e), (6U)) ^ s_safe_rotr((U32)(e), (11U)) ^ s_safe_rotr((U32)(e), (25U))))))) + (U32)((((e) & (f)) ^ (~(e) & (g))))))) + (U32)(k[i])))) + (U32)(m[i])));
    74 2 16     *         t2 = ((U32)((U32)((s_safe_rotr((U32)(a), (2U)) ^ s_safe_rotr((U32)(a), (13U)) ^ s_safe_rotr((U32)(a), (22U)))) + (U32)((((a) & (b)) ^ ((a) & (c)) ^ ((b) & (c))))));
    75 2 17     *         h = g; 
    75 2 18     *         g = f; 
    75 2 19     *         f = e; 
    75 2 20     *         e = ((U32)((U32)(d) + (U32)(t1))); 
    75 2 21     *         d = c; 
    75 2 22     *         c = b; 
    75 2 23     *         b = a; 
    75 2 24     *         a = ((U32)((U32)(t1) + (U32)(t2)));
                      	}
    78 2 25     *       ctx->state[0] = ((U32)((U32)(ctx->state[0]) + (U32)(a))); 
    79 2 26     *       ctx->state[1] = ((U32)((U32)(ctx->state[1]) + (U32)(b))); 
    80 2 27     *       ctx->state[2] = ((U32)((U32)(ctx->state[2]) + (U32)(c))); 
    81 2 28     *       ctx->state[3] = ((U32)((U32)(ctx->state[3]) + (U32)(d)));
    82 2 29     *       ctx->state[4] = ((U32)((U32)(ctx->state[4]) + (U32)(e))); 
    83 2 30     *       ctx->state[5] = ((U32)((U32)(ctx->state[5]) + (U32)(f))); 
    84 2 31     *       ctx->state[6] = ((U32)((U32)(ctx->state[6]) + (U32)(g))); 
    85 2 32     *       ctx->state[7] = ((U32)((U32)(ctx->state[7]) + (U32)(h)));

                      static void s_sha256_init(SHA256_CTX *ctx)
                      {
    89 3 0     (T)    s_sha256_init
    90 3 1      *       ctx->bitcount = 0U;
    91 3 2      *       ctx->state[0] = 0x6a09e667U; 
    91 3 3      *       ctx->state[1] = 0xbb67ae85U; 
    91 3 4      *       ctx->state[2] = 0x3c6ef372U;
    92 3 5      *       ctx->state[3] = 0xa54ff53aU; 
    92 3 6      *       ctx->state[4] = 0x510e527fU; 
    92 3 7      *       ctx->state[5] = 0x9b05688cU;
    93 3 8      *       ctx->state[6] = 0x1f83d9abU; 
    93 3 9      *       ctx->state[7] = 0x5be0cd19U;
                      }
                      static void s_sha256_update(SHA256_CTX *ctx,  const U8 *data, U32 len)
                      {
    97 4 0     (T)    s_sha256_update
    98 4 1     (T)(F)   if (len != ( U32 )0U) {
                              U32 i;
